entry.title: Efficient LLM Agents via Novel Attention Patterns
entry.summary: We introduce a novel attention mechanism that reduces memory usage by 40% while maintaining accuracy on standard benchmarks. Our agent framework demonstrates 2x throughput improvements over baseline transformer architectures.

entry.title: Scalable Fine-Tuning with LoRA Variants
entry.summary: A comprehensive comparison of LoRA, QLoRA, and AdaLoRA across seven benchmarks. Results show QLoRA achieves 95% of full fine-tuning quality at 12% of the memory cost.

entry.title: Survey of Multimodal Language Models
entry.summary: A survey covering 50 multimodal language models published between 2023 and 2025, analysing architectural choices, training data, and evaluation benchmarks.
